esp8266_softwareserial_init.message0: Initialize soft serial port %1 RX pin %2 TX pin %3 Baud rate %4
esp8266_softwareserial_init.tooltip: Create a software-simulated serial port, specify the RX (receive) and TX (transmit) pins and baud rate

esp8266_softwareserial_available.message0: Soft serial port %1 buffer has data
esp8266_softwareserial_available.tooltip: Returns the number of bytes that can be read in the soft serial port receive buffer

esp8266_softwareserial_read.tooltip: Read data from the soft serial port. read() reads a byte, peek() checks but does not remove it, and other reads formatted data

esp8266_softwareserial_print.tooltip: Output data through the soft serial port (without line breaks)

esp8266_softwareserial_println.message0: Soft serial port %1 outputs %2 and wraps the line
esp8266_softwareserial_println.tooltip: Output data through the soft serial port and wrap

esp8266_softwareserial_write.message0: Soft serial port %1 output raw data %2
esp8266_softwareserial_write.tooltip: Send raw byte data through soft serial port

esp8266_softwareserial_listen.message0: Set the soft serial port %1 as the active listening port
esp8266_softwareserial_listen.tooltip: Set the specified soft serial port as the active listening port. Only one soft serial port can be in monitoring state at the same time

esp8266_softwareserial_islistening.tooltip: Check whether the specified soft serial port is the current active listening port

esp8266_softwareserial_overflow.tooltip: Check whether the soft serial port receive buffer has overflowed (the overflow flag will be cleared after the call)

esp8266_softwareserial_end.tooltip: Stop soft serial communication and release related resources
